---
name: Standard Issue
about: Suggest documentation improvements, ask general questions, or propose general repository tasks.
title: '[ISSUE] '
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

## Codebase Zone
Please specify which component or zone of the codebase this issue relates to:
- [ ] Crypto (AES-GCM, Argon2, Zeroize, key derivation)
- [ ] Storage (SQLCipher, database schema, SQLite interactions)
- [ ] Session (PTY execution, shell injection, expiration timers)
- [ ] UI (Slint views, styles, layout, user interaction)
- [ ] Build & CI (Cargo configuration, packaging, actions, workflows)
- [ ] Docs (README, wiki, guides, developer onboarding)
- [ ] Other (Please specify)

## Issue Description
A clear and concise description of the task, question, or work item.

## Expected Outcome
Describe the expected results, documentation additions, or architectural alignment resulting from resolving this issue.
